hero.subheadline: Universal Productivity Zone, kullanıcıların beceri öğrenmesine, iş bulmasına, ekip yönetmesine, serbest çalışan olarak büyümesine ve yapay zeka destekli araçlarla tek bir kişiselleştirilmiş çalışma alanında çalışmasına yardımcı olur.

problem.title: Dağınık araç sorunu
problem.subtitle: Bugün profesyoneller, işlerini halletmek için onlarca uygulama arasında gidip gelmek zorunda.

solution.title: İhtiyacın olan her şey, nihayet birleşti
solution.subtitle: UPZ, mesleki büyüme ve günlük iş için tüm temel araçları, sürtünmeyi ortadan kaldırmak için tasarlanmış tek, tutarlı bir ortamda bir araya getiriyor.

features.title: Her profesyonel için güçlü özellikler
features.subtitle: Çalışmak, öğrenmek ve büyümek için ihtiyacın olan her şey, güzelce entegre edilmiş.

items.title: Kişiselleştirilmiş Çalışma Alanı
items.description: Geliştirici, tasarımcı veya içerik üreticisi olsan da, rolüne adapte olan bir ortam.

items.title: Sohbet Sistemi
items.description: Harici mesajlaşma uygulamalarına ihtiyaç duymadan ekipler ve müşteriler için yerleşik iletişim araçları.

items.title: Gösterge Paneli
items.description: Tüm devam eden projeler, görevler ve finansal metrikler için gerçek zamanlı analitik.

items.title: Görevler ve Notlar
items.description: Doğrudan bilgi tabanınıza bağlı güçlü proje yönetimi.

items.title: Öğrenme Sistemi
items.description: Kariyer hedeflerinize göre kişiselleştirilmiş entegre kurslar ve beceri geliştirme yolları.

items.title: Serbest Çalışma ve İşe Alım
items.description: Aynı platform içinde iş bul, yetenek işe al ve sözleşmeleri yönet.

items.title: İçerik ve Sosyal Medya Araçları
items.description: Birden fazla kanalda içerik stratejini planla, zamanla ve yönet.

items.title: Evrensel Banka
items.description: Harici ödeme ağ geçitleri olmadan faturaları, ödemeleri ve mali takibi yönet.

items.title: AI Asistan
items.description: Mesaj taslağı oluşturma, projeleri planlama ve bilgileri özetlemede yardımcı olan bağlam farkında AI.

steps.title: Profilini Ayarla
steps.desc: Mesleğini, hedefini ve deneyim seviyeni seç

steps.title: Çalışma Alanını Al
steps.desc: Tamamen kişiselleştirilmiş bir verimlilik ortamı al

forWhom.title: Her profesyonel için inşa edildi
forWhom.subtitle: Ne yaparsan yap, UPZ sana uyum sağlar.

ai.title: AI verimlilik ortağınla tanış
ai.subtitle: İş hayatının her bölümü için akıllı yardım. E-posta taslağından tüm proje yaşam döngülerini planlamaya kadar.

freelancer.title: Sıfırdan serbest çalışan ol
freelancer.subtitle: UPZ sadece bir serbest çalışma pazaryeri değil — yeni başlayandan kazanan profesyonele kadar eksiksiz bir yol.

cta.title: Bugün gelecekteki çalışma alanını oluşturmaya başla.
cta.subtitle: Öğrenme, çalışma, iş birliği ve mesleki büyüme için tasarlanmış bir platforma katıl.

footer.tagline: Universal Productivity Zone, dağınık araçlarının yerini alan hepsi bir arada çalışma alanı. Tek yerde çalış, öğren ve kazan.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Universal Productivity Zone. Tüm hakları saklıdır.

topbar.tagline: Tek ?al??ma alan?nda ?al??, ??ren, kazan ve i? birli?i yap.
topbar.commandReady: Command center aramas? backend ba?lant?s?na haz?r.
topbar.noResults: E?le?en kullan?c?, sohbet, g?rev veya proje yok.
topbar.notificationsDesc: Proje, sohbet, banka ve haber g?ncellemeleri
topbar.localOnly: Bildirim merkezi bu MVP i?in yerel ?al???r.

dashboard.description: UPZ command center projeleri, sohbeti, AI??, ekipleri, c?zdan?, bildirimleri ve workspace sa?l???n? tek temiz g?r?n?mde toplar.
dashboard.heroTitle: G?n? sakin ve ba?l? bir workspace?ten y?net.
dashboard.heroDesc: Sohbet QA ile ba?la, proje demo yolunu g?zden ge?ir, c?zdan durumlar?n? onayla, sonra AI?dan launch plan al.
dashboard.nextActionsDesc: Clickable command cards backend karma??kl??? olmadan MVP?yi ger?ek hissettirir.
dashboard.ecosystemDesc: Tam UPZ product system i?in daha zengin mock data.

commands.chatDesc: Pinned mesajlar, arama, reaksiyonlar ve mobile navigation QA i?in haz?r.
commands.projectDesc: Command center, teams, projects, bank ve assistant surfaces ?zerinden ge?.
commands.walletDesc: Freelance payment ve pending payout durumlar? Universal Bank?ta g?r?n?r.
commands.aiDesc: Product launch, onboarding ve beta feedback i?in sonraki ad?mlar? olu?tur.

chat.pinnedNotice: Pinned message preview demo?da lokal kal?r.
chat.historyClearedDesc: Bu lokal MVP konu?mas?n? yeniden ba?latmak i?in yeni mesaj g?nder.
chat.noChatsLeftDesc: Bu lokal MVP demo. localStorage temizlenince refresh mock chat setini geri getirir.
chat.noMessageFoundDesc: Ba?ka bir kelime dene veya t?m mesajlar? g?rmek i?in aramay? kapat.

home.description: Hedef: {{goal}}. UPZ ?al??ma alan?, projeler, topluluk, haberler, c?zdan, ekipler ve AI asistan? tek sistemde birle?tirir.
home.quickActionsDesc: Fast entry points into the expanded UPZ ecosystem.
home.todaysTasksDesc: Simple task state still works locally while the product grows.
home.recentActivityDesc: Activity feed pattern for future backend events.

workspace.title: {{profession}} komuta merkezi
workspace.description: Tabs, reorderable cards, integration placeholders, and layout controls extend the MVP workspace into a scalable user-customizable hub.
workspace.projectWorkspaceDesc: Drag cards to preview custom layout behavior. The order is local UI state in this MVP.

cards.reposDesc: 3 active repositories, 3 open pull requests, staging ready.
cards.tasksDesc: Sprint board with assignment, status, deadlines, and activity.
cards.filesDesc: Drive, docs, briefs, invoices, and project assets in one hub.
cards.calendarDesc: Upcoming standups, deadlines, learning blocks, and review sessions.

workspace.toolIntegrationsDesc: Backend-ready integration cards for GitHub, Drive, Slack, Calendar, and future providers.
workspace.layoutDesc: This tab demonstrates how a future backend can persist per-user workspace layouts, tab choices, hidden cards, and integration preferences.

community.title: Mesle?e g?re gruplar, kanallar ve tart??malar
community.description: Public communities give every UPZ user a place to learn, collaborate, moderate, and discover opportunities without leaving their workspace.
community.publicGroupsDesc: Join or leave profession spaces. Counts and membership are local UI state for the MVP.
community.moderationDesc: Keep communities clean with lightweight queues and role controls.
community.threadsDesc: Thread-like discussions for structured community conversations.
community.channelsDesc: Broadcast-style spaces inspired by channel workflows.
community.networkDepthDesc: More mock data for future segmentation, recommendations, and public discovery.
community.featuredCreatorsDesc: Community leaders, mentors, and public contributors.
community.postSystemDesc: A backend-ready composer and comments model, kept simple for the MVP demo.
community.postPlaceholder: Bir soru, kaynak veya g?ncelleme payla?...

initialComments.onboarding: This would help onboarding a lot.
initialComments.rituals: Can we add a template for team rituals?

news.title: Ki?isel zeka ak???
news.description: A clean reading surface for profession-aware news, saved articles, trending topics, and lightweight article views.
news.articleViewDesc: A simple backend-ready article surface with save state.
news.productionBody: In a production UPZ backend, this view would support authors, sources, recommendations, and profession-based personalization. For the MVP, it demonstrates hierarchy, reading rhythm, and saved state without adding content infrastructure.

bank.title: C?zdan, kazan?lar ve ?deme ge?mi?i
bank.description: A finance-ready UI layer for freelance income, payouts, local payments, crypto placeholders, and subscription history.
bank.transactionsDesc: Payment history with statuses ready for real backend records.
bank.paymentRailsDesc: Crypto and local payment methods remain placeholders for MVP.

assistant.title: G?revler, ??renme ve projeler i?in ?retkenlik copilotu
assistant.description: The assistant is designed as an app-wide layer: chat, suggestions, learning support, project ideation, and future tool calls.
assistant.chatDesc: MVP chat surface with local demo responses.

messages.welcome: Hi, I can help turn your workspace into actions. Ask for task suggestions, learning help, or project ideas.
messages.focusPlan: Suggest a focus plan for this week.
messages.focusAnswer: Start with chat polish, then ship community moderation, then connect wallet history to projects.
messages.demoResponse: Demo response: I would connect to your tasks, projects, learning profile, and chat history once backend AI tools are available.

assistant.taskSuggestionsDesc: Context-aware prompts for the next backend iteration.

suggestions.createTasks: Create 5 tasks from my current projects
suggestions.learnNext: Explain what I should learn next

assistant.modesDesc: Simple, discoverable modes instead of a cluttered AI cockpit.

learning.title: Learning
learning.desc: Explain concepts and build study paths

assistant.ideaGeneratorDesc: More mock prompt/output examples for future backend tool calls.
assistant.learningPathsDesc: AI can later recommend adaptive learning paths based on profession, goals, and workspace activity.

teams.title: Ekip olu?tur, rol ata ve sohbet ba?la
teams.description: A scalable team layer for admins, members, dashboards, and team communication.
teams.dashboardDesc: A lightweight operating view for team health.
teams.linkedChatDesc: UPZ Core Team chat is connected to this dashboard for future backend activity sync.
teams.membersRolesDesc: Admin/member role display with add-member placeholder.
teams.modalDesc: Demo modal from the expanded component system.

projects.title: Kanban, atama, tarihler ve etkinlik
projects.description: A production-ready project surface that can later connect tasks, chat, team roles, files, and wallet invoices.
projects.kanbanDesc: Cards are arranged for drag-and-drop behavior. MVP uses static columns with hover affordances.
projects.assignmentDesc: Assign tasks to team members and roles.
projects.activityLogDesc: A future audit stream for every project action.
projects.modalDesc: Project modal placeholder for future backend integration.

settings.integrationsIntro: Connect external services to enhance your workspace. No real credentials required in this demo.

integrations.github: Connect repos and track code activity
integrations.instagram: Track your IG analytics and schedule posts
integrations.youtube: Monitor channel stats and video performance
integrations.gdrive: Access and manage your Drive files

n1.title: MVP Feature List
n1.content: Dashboard, Chat, Tasks, Workspace, Profile, Settings. Keep it simple for v1.

n2.title: Design System Colors
n2.content:
Background: #F7FAFC
Cards: #FFFFFF
Border: #E5E7EB
Text: #111827
Accent: #6366F1 and #3B82F6

n3.title: Meeting Notes - Sprint 1
n3.content: Focus on landing page polish and internal app skeleton. Demo ready by Friday.

chatMessages.m1: Hey! Have you seen the new project specs?
chatMessages.m2: Yes, just checked them out. The scope feels tight enough for MVP.
chatMessages.m4: Can you review the PR before then?
chatMessages.m6: They look amazing! Love the color palette.
chatMessages.m7: Sprint review is tomorrow at 10 AM.
chatMessages.m8: I'll prepare the demo flow and keep it under seven minutes.
chatMessages.m10: Marketing brief sent to all stakeholders.
chatMessages.m11: Thanks everyone, great work this sprint! ??
chatMessages.m12: Wireframes attached in Figma. The hero CTA variant is the one to test.
chatMessages.m14: Anyone interested in a collab for this month?
chatMessages.m16: UX audit for a SaaS startup.
